summary: The diff implements a local authentication system via useLocalAuth hook, updates LoginPage.tsx with tab-based UI, silent error handling, and spinner feedback. Most requirements appear to be addressed, but the useLocalAuth hook file itself is not shown directly in the diff (only referenced in the file summary), making full verification of REQ-1 acceptance criteria partially dependent on the truncated summary.

missing_requirements.requirement: Logout clears the session from localStorage (REQ-1 AC)
missing_requirements.reason: The diff does not show any logout functionality being implemented or tested. LoginPage.tsx only handles login and signup. The useLocalAuth hook summary mentions login/signup but does not explicitly confirm a logout function that clears localStorage session.

hallucinated_features.description: Default INR balance set to 1000.00 for new user registrations
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request states new accounts are created with default INR and USDT balances but does not specify specific values. The file summary for useLocalAuth.ts explicitly mentions default balance values set to INR 1000.00 and USDT 0.00. Setting specific numeric values was not requested — the requirement only says default balances without specifying amounts.

hallucinated_features.description: One-time migration that updates all existing users INR balances
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any migration of existing user data. The file summary for useLocalAuth.ts mentions a one-time migration that updates all existing users INR balances which was not requested.
